rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by removing invalid property references and type mismatches
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types; bool for comparisons, int for integer arithmetic, real for real arithmetic
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool in const and eq declarations
Remove guarantees with unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations
generic_rules: Use only visible identifiers in contracts
Align type declarations with expression types
Remove invalid clauses instead of adding architecture
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool
Trace unresolved identifiers to their root cause
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree blocks
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers in guarantees
eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references absent from the analyzed model
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not use unresolved identifiers in guarantees
Do not use invalid helper declarations in guarantees
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
